title: Delhi, Noida, Gurugram rain update: IMD issues yellow alert for capital, showers and thunderstorms to continue in NCR
description: Delhi-NCR weather rain news: Delhi is set for a spell of rain and gusty winds until June 4, with temperatures expected to stay below 40 degrees Celsius. The India Meteorological Department has issued a yellow alert, forecasting thunderstorms and winds up to 5…
